Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Request Part 1 Normative Process Behavior Strict rules Sequence Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant If Approved Finalize Documentation Close Case If Rejected Close Case without Finalize Documentation Not Allowed Skipping steps changing order finalizing docs after rejection closing without following decision logic Part 2 Desiderata Recommended but not strict Credit Check within 24 hours of Application Received Inform Applicant within 48 hours of Loan Decision Follow up Call before closing encouraged not required Event Log 3 cases Case 1 2 3 with various activities and timestamps Tasks Identify normative violations and explain reasons Identify desiderata failures and clarify they are suboptimal but not severe Suggest interpretations justifications for observed behaviors

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze Case 1 Sequence App Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Approved Inform Applicant Finalize Documentation Close Case Normative Rules Perfectly followed Desiderata Credit Check within 24h yes Inform Applicant within 48h yes Follow up call Not present Desideratum violation

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Interpretation Well executed process adhering to both strict rules and most recommendations missing only the optional follow up call

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze Case 2 Sequence App Received Risk Assessment Credit Check Loan Decision Rejected Finalize Documentation Close Case Normative Rules Violated Risk Assessment occurred before Credit Check Order violation Finalize Documentation occurred after Rejected decision Not allowed after rejection

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets check Case 2 strictly App Received Risk Assessment Violation Before Credit Check Credit Check Violation Out of order Loan Decision Rejected Finalize Documentation Violation Not allowed after rejection Close Case Missing Inform Applicant Skipped step

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Interpretation Highly problematic case The process worker might have bypassed standard checks perhaps due to an initial risk flag and erroneously processed documentation before realizing or properly handling the rejection completely failing to inform the applicant

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze Case 3 Sequence App Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Approved Inform Applicant Finalize Documentation Close Case Normative Rules Followed Sequence is correct Approved Finalize Documentation before Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Desiderata Credit Check within 24h Jan 12 0900 to Jan 14 1000 more than 48 hours Desideratum violation Inform Applicant within 48h Jan 14 1200 to Jan 16 1500 about 51 hours Desideratum violation Follow up Call Missing Desideratum violation

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Interpretation Process compliance is met but efficiency is poor Delays could be due to a high workload a complex application requiring manual credit checks or system downtime The lack of a follow up call alongside these delays might indicate a resource constrained environment

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Draft the Response Task 1 Normative Violations Focus on Case 2 Order Skipping Inform Applicant Finalize Docs after Rejection Mention Case 1 and 3 are compliant normatively Task 2 Desiderata Failures Case 1 No Follow up call Case 3 Credit check more than 24h Inform more than 48h No Follow up call Task 3 Interpretations Justifications Case 1 efficient but maybe caller backlog Case 2 rogue worker or system error causing out of order and missing steps Case 3 delays due to external factors manual checks or busy periods

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Refine and Format Ensure all constraints from the prompt are addressed clearly Structure with clear headings for Task 1 Task 2 and Task 3 Double check Case 2 sequence App Received Risk Assessment Violates Credit check before risk Credit Check Loan Decision Rejected Finalize Documentation Violates Not allowed after rejection Close Case Wait where is Inform Applicant Its missing Violates Skipping activities in the required sequence Make sure to emphasize that desiderata failures are suboptimal but not severe
